lsp.justification: The answer correctly classifies the few sites it lists, including debug.c jemalloc mallctl as memory allocator and HAVE_BACKTRACE in debug.c as crash/debug reporting, but it badly undercounts by treating only literal `#ifdef` forms as in scope. It misses almost all USE_JEMALLOC-gated source files called out by the GT, misses the Makefile jemalloc build/link effect, and underreports HAVE_BACKTRACE occurrences/config details, so it is substantially incomplete.
